com.mentor.chs.api.servicedoc

Interface IXProjectDataGenerator

  • All Superinterfaces:
    IXGenerator, IXPlugin

    public interface IXProjectDataGenerator
extends IXGenerator

    Interface for generating project level data. When packager starts generating the data, it calls this interface once for the selected project. It is up to the generator on how to generate the data for viewing it later.

    See Also:
    IXDesignDataGenerator, IXDiagramDataGenerator

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Abstract Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      java.util.Set<java.io.File> generateProjectData(IXPackagerContext context, IXProject project)
      Get the set of files that are generated on this project.

      • Methods inherited from interface com.mentor.chs.plugin.IXPlugin

        getDescription, getName, getVersion

    • Method Detail

      • generateProjectData

        java.util.Set<java.io.File> generateProjectData(IXPackagerContext context,
                                                IXProject project)
        Get the set of files that are generated on this project. The name are just written to the log file. It is up to this method on how the data has to be generated.
        Parameters:
        context - Packager context containing project scope and links to resources area
        project - selected project
        Returns:
        Set of files generated
